summary: Tested 3 specific features: (1) Supported Currencies Add button - correctly disabled with <3 chars, enabled with 3 chars, adds to list with success toast and clears input; (2) Plans tab Shadcn sub-tabs - License Plans, One-Time Rates, Coupons, Coupon Usage all render as pill-style TabsList/TabsTrigger and are clickable with correct content; (3) Resources tab Shadcn sub-tabs - Resources, Templates, Email Templates, Categories all render as pill-style Shadcn Tabs and are clickable with correct content. Partner Orgs tab (design reference) also confirmed working.

issues: React hydration warning in console: '<span> cannot be a child of <tbody>' and '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>'. Occurs in PlansSection table when rendering plan rows dynamically. Functional but a React markup violation that may cause hydration mismatches in SSR. Likely caused by a dynamic wrapper (data-ve-dynamic span) injected around <tr> inside <tbody>.

action_items: LOW: Fix React hydration warning in PlansTab.tsx PlansSection - <span> elements wrapping <tr> inside <tbody> causes invalid HTML. Look at line 440 in PlansTab.tsx (tbody with dynamic rendering). The span data-ve-dynamic wrapper should not be placed directly inside tbody.
critical_code_review_comments: CurrenciesTab.tsx: Add button logic is correct - `disabled={adding || newCode.trim().length !== 3}` properly enables at exactly 3 chars. POST /admin/platform/currencies is called with correct payload. Input is cleared after success. Test confirmed: button disabled at 0 and 2 chars, enabled at 3 chars.

PlansTab.tsx (line 1175-1201): Shadcn Tabs correctly implemented with defaultValue='plans', all 4 TabsTrigger elements have data-testids (plans-section-plans, plans-section-rates, plans-section-coupons, plans-section-usage). All 4 TabsContent values match triggers.

ResourcesTab.tsx (line 411-437): Shadcn Tabs uses value={subTab} with onValueChange handler, 4 sub-tabs have correct data-testids (subtab-resources, subtab-templates, subtab-email-templates, subtab-categories). Admin header correctly changes subtitle based on subTab state.
Minor React hydration warning in PlansTab.tsx when plan rows are dynamically rendered inside tbody - span wrapper placed inside tbody is invalid HTML per browser standards.
seed_data_creation: None (JPY added for test then removed as cleanup)
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_167: All 3 requested features verified PASS. (1) Currencies Add button: enabled at 3 chars, adds JPY to list, shows toast, clears input - PASS. (2) Plans tab Shadcn Tabs: License Plans, One-Time Rates, Coupons, Coupon Usage - all present and clickable, correct content per tab - PASS. (3) Resources tab Shadcn Tabs: Resources, Templates, Email Templates, Categories - all present and clickable, correct content per tab - PASS. (4) Partner Orgs sub-tabs (reference): Partner List, Partner Types, Industries, Tags - still working PASS. Minor: React hydration warning (span in tbody) in PlansSection - functional but worth fixing.
